use_cases.name: Baseline smoke test
use_cases.description: Feature area is accessible and renders correctly
use_cases.acceptance_criteria: Feature area is accessible and renders correctly

use_cases.name: hotel_details_full_page_load
use_cases.description: The Hotel Details page loads completely within 5 seconds displaying: hotel name, photo gallery with at least one image, star rating, amenities section (Wi-Fi, pool, parking etc.), per-night price in INR, total price summary, and a clearly visible 'Book Now' or equivalent CTA button
use_cases.acceptance_criteria: The Hotel Details page loads completely within 5 seconds displaying: hotel name, photo gallery with at least one image, star rating, amenities section (Wi-Fi, pool, parking etc.), per-night price in INR, total price summary, and a clearly visible 'Book Now' or equivalent CTA button

use_cases.name: booking_cta_navigation
use_cases.description: Tapping the 'Book Now' CTA successfully navigates the user to the room selection or booking confirmation screen. The price displayed on the details page matches the price carried forward to the next step.
use_cases.acceptance_criteria: Tapping the 'Book Now' CTA successfully navigates the user to the room selection or booking confirmation screen. The price displayed on the details page matches the price carried forward to the next step.

use_cases.name: photo_gallery_scroll_and_expand
use_cases.description: Photos load correctly in the carousel with smooth swiping. Full-screen mode opens without a crash, displays photo count (e.g. 3/12), and back navigation returns the user to the Hotel Details page with all sections still intact.
use_cases.acceptance_criteria: Photos load correctly in the carousel with smooth swiping. Full-screen mode opens without a crash, displays photo count (e.g. 3/12), and back navigation returns the user to the Hotel Details page with all sections still intact.

use_cases.name: hotel_details_load_on_slow_network
use_cases.description: The Hotel Details page shows a loading spinner or skeleton placeholders while content is fetching. Once loaded, all sections (photos, amenities, price, CTA) are visible. If the request times out, a user-friendly error message with a 'Retry' option is displayed instead of a crash or blank screen.
use_cases.acceptance_criteria: The Hotel Details page shows a loading spinner or skeleton placeholders while content is fetching. Once loaded, all sections (photos, amenities, price, CTA) are visible. If the request times out, a user-friendly error message with a 'Retry' option is displayed instead of a crash or blank screen.

use_cases.name: hotel_details_no_internet_connection
use_cases.description: The app displays a clear 'No Internet Connection' error message with a Retry button. If a cached Hotel Details page is shown, a stale-data warning is displayed. The app does not crash or show a blank page.
use_cases.acceptance_criteria: The app displays a clear 'No Internet Connection' error message with a Retry button. If a cached Hotel Details page is shown, a stale-data warning is displayed. The app does not crash or show a blank page.

use_cases.name: amenities_section_completeness
use_cases.description: The Amenities section is visible even when the hotel has very few or no amenities. If no amenities are listed, a placeholder such as 'No amenities listed' is shown rather than a blank or broken section. Expanding 'View All' shows all available amenities without layout breakage.
use_cases.acceptance_criteria: The Amenities section is visible even when the hotel has very few or no amenities. If no amenities are listed, a placeholder such as 'No amenities listed' is shown rather than a blank or broken section. Expanding 'View All' shows all available amenities without layout breakage.

use_cases.name: back_navigation_from_hotel_details
use_cases.description: Pressing back from the Hotel Details page returns the user to the search results list at the same scroll position without data loss or reload. The search filters and results are preserved. Opening a second hotel's details page works correctly without displaying stale data from the previous hotel.
use_cases.acceptance_criteria: Pressing back from the Hotel Details page returns the user to the search results list at the same scroll position without data loss or reload. The search filters and results are preserved. Opening a second hotel's details page works correctly without displaying stale data from the previous hotel.

use_cases.name: price_consistency_inr_display
use_cases.description: The per-night price in INR shown on the Hotel Details page matches the price displayed on the hotel listing card (±0 discrepancy for same date/room type). The price breakdown clearly shows base price, taxes, and total. The currency symbol '₹' is correctly rendered throughout the page with no placeholder or encoding issues.
use_cases.acceptance_criteria: The per-night price in INR shown on the Hotel Details page matches the price displayed on the hotel listing card (±0 discrepancy for same date/room type). The price breakdown clearly shows base price, taxes, and total. The currency symbol '₹' is correctly rendered throughout the page with no placeholder or encoding issues.
